## Contribution Type

- [ ] Problem workspace
- [ ] Claim
- [ ] Route
- [ ] Attempt
- [ ] Failure or refutation
- [ ] Source/reference
- [ ] Documentation

## What Changed

Briefly state the research-state improvement.

## Verification

- [ ] Sources are precise, or derivation is reproducible.
- [ ] Dependencies are listed.
- [ ] Gap or weakness is explicit.
- [ ] AI assistance is disclosed.
- [ ] No raw transcript is included.
- [ ] Text follows `docs/text-policy.md`.

## Review Needed

- [ ] LLM triage
- [ ] Human mathematical review
- [ ] Formal verification
